Class LoaderSettings

java.lang.Object
dev.dejvokep.boostedyaml.settings.loader.LoaderSettings
All Implemented Interfaces:
Settings
public class LoaderSettings extends Object implements Settings
Loader settings cover all options related explicitly (only) to file loading.

Settings introduced by BoostedYAML follow builder design pattern, e.g. you may build your own settings using LoaderSettings.builder() //configure// .build()

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    LoaderSettings.Builder
    Builder for loader settings; wrapper for SnakeYAML Engine's LoadSettingsBuilder class which is more detailed, provides more options and possibilities, hides options which should not be configured.

    • buildEngineSettings

      public org.snakeyaml.engine.v2.api.LoadSettings buildEngineSettings(GeneralSettings generalSettings)
      Builds the SnakeYAML Engine settings.
      Parameters:
      generalSettings - settings used to get defaults (list, set, map) from
      Returns:
      the new settings

    • builder

      public static LoaderSettings.Builder builder()
      Returns a new builder.
      Returns:
      the new builder

    • builder

      public static LoaderSettings.Builder builder(org.snakeyaml.engine.v2.api.LoadSettingsBuilder builder)
      Creates and returns a new builder from the given, already created SnakeYAML Engine settings builder.

      Note that the given builder is not cloned, so it is in the caller's best interest to never change it's settings from now on.

      Please note that LoaderSettings.Builder.setCreateFileIfAbsent(boolean) and LoaderSettings.Builder.setAutoUpdate(boolean) still have to be called (if you want to alter the default), as they are not part of the Engine's settings.

      Parameters:
      builder - the underlying builder
      Returns:
      the new builder

    • builder

      public static LoaderSettings.Builder builder(LoaderSettings settings)
      Returns a new builder with the same configuration as the given settings.
      Parameters:
      settings - preset settings
      Returns:
      the new builder
